title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Nykaa - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Nykaa - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Nykaa. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Digital Marketing Manager to strengthen our Chandigarh-based team.

About Nykaa:
Nykaa is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Data Analytics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nykaa!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
